title: Vibrant Winey Korean Cashews Naengmyeon
description: A refreshing and crunchy Korean dish featuring cashews and a winey flavor, perfect for a brunch mood. This Mediterranean-friendly naengmyeon dish is a unique twist on traditional Korean cuisine.
instructions: Cook the naengmyeon noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
In a blender or food processor, combine gochujang, soy sauce, rice vinegar, honey, garlic, and sesame oil, and blend until smooth.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked noodles, blended sauce, and chopped cashews, and toss to combine.
Add the red wine to the bowl and toss to coat the noodles and cashews.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, give the noodles and cashews a good toss to redistribute the sauce.
Serve the naengmyeon cold, garnished with additional chopped cashews if desired.
